make the following text for my resume more concise, in text format.

Bachelor’s degrees in Graphic Design and Computer Science/Information Technologies showcase my diverse skill set and blend creativity with analytical acumen.
As a Native Portuguese speaker from Brazil, I bring a unique cultural perspective. Additionally, my high proficiency in English facilitates seamless communication in international settings.
I thrive on flexible work hours and have a natural inclination toward adaptability. Efficiently managing tasks, projects, and meeting deadlines punctually, I am adept at prioritizing tasks effectively, ensuring optimal productivity.
I am a dedicated and fast-learning professional who embraces a growth mindset and is always hungry for knowledge. My innate curiosity, detail-oriented nature, and resourceful self-teaching abilities fuel my desire to constantly grow, continuously learn, and always expand my horizons.
I possess an innate ability to prioritize tasks, ensuring optimal efficiency. Coupled with my aptitude for conducting comprehensive research and data collection, I uncover valuable insights that guide informed decision-making.
Always willing to provide constructive feedback, guidance, and motivation to foster collective success. I also possess the capability to take charge of projects when needed.
My problem-solving prowess enables me to identify and resolve issues efficiently, finding innovative solutions along the way.
Adapting to changing circumstances comes naturally to me, and I thrive in diverse environments, leveraging my versatility to tackle new situations and handle changes with ease.
With a keen analytical mind, I possess the ability to analyze, evaluate, and interpret complex information, providing a solid foundation for decision-making processes.
Committed to delivering exceptional work, I consistently address customer needs effectively, ensuring their utmost satisfaction.

I bring a powerful blend of expertise, creativity, and adaptability, bolstered by my diverse educational background. As a dedicated, detail-oriented, and self-taught professional, I am driven by an insatiable curiosity that propels me to constantly seek more knowledge. With a proven ability to efficiently manage tasks, overcome challenges, and deliver excellence, I am well-prepared to embrace new opportunities and make a significant impact.

Bachelor’s degrees in Graphic Design and Computer Science/Information Technologies showcase my diverse skill set and blend creativity with analytical acumen. Raised in Brazil, I offer a unique cultural perspective and excellent English skills for international settings. I excel at managing tasks, projects, and deadlines, prioritizing effectively for optimized productivity. With a growth mindset and a hunger for knowledge, I am a dedicated, fast-learning professional always looking to expand my horizons. I have a talent for research and uncovering valuable insights, as well as the ability to provide feedback and take charge of projects. My problem-solving skills allow me to find innovative solutions and adapt easily to changing circumstances. Analytical and customer-oriented, I consistently meet and exceed expectations. With my expertise, creativity, and adaptability, I am ready to make a significant impact in new opportunities.
is it bad if my resume has two pages and the second page is half blank?

Ideally, it is recommended to keep your resume to one page, especially for entry-level positions or if you have limited work experience. However, if you have extensive experience or accomplishments relevant to the job you are applying for, it is acceptable to have a two-page resume. 

Having a second page that is half blank is not necessarily a negative. However, it is important to make sure that the content on your resume is concise, relevant, and well-organized. If you find that your resume is too long and there is excess space on the second page, consider revising and condensing the information to fit on one page. Ensuring that your resume flows well and is visually appealing is important for capturing the attention of employers.

As a native Portuguese speaker from Brazil, I offer a unique cultural perspective and excel in communicating seamlessly in international settings. Thriving on adaptability and flexible work hours, I effectively manage tasks, projects, and deadlines, prioritizing for optimal productivity. A dedicated and fast-learning professional, I embrace a growth mindset and possess an innate curiosity, detail-oriented nature, and resourceful self-teaching abilities that drive my continuous growth and expansion of horizons. As a detail-oriented, self-driven professional, I possess an insatiable curiosity that drives me to constantly seek knowledge. With a proven track record of efficiently managing tasks, overcoming challenges, and delivering excellence, I am well-prepared to embrace new opportunities and make a significant impact.
50 Interests and Hobbies to put in my resume

While it's not necessary to include interests and hobbies on your resume, they can be a valuable addition if they are relevant to the job or showcase desirable skills. Here are 50 ideas for interests and hobbies that you could consider including:

1. Photography
2. Graphic Design
3. Coding/Programming
4. Video Editing
5. Web Development
6. Writing/Blogging
7. Drawing/Illustration
8. Playing a Musical Instrument
9. Cooking/Baking
10. Fitness/Exercise
11. Yoga/Meditation
12. Outdoor Activities (hiking, camping, running)
13. Traveling
14. Learning a New Language
15. Volunteer Work
16. Community Service
17. DIY Projects
18. Gardening
19. Painting
20. Film/TV Production
21. Playing Sports (soccer, basketball, tennis)
22. Creative Writing
23. Book Club Memberships
24. Film/TV Criticism
25. Animation
26. Fashion Design
27. Acting/Theater
28. Woodworking
29. Computer Gaming
30. Social Media Management
31. Event Planning
32. Wine Tasting
33. Stand-up Comedy
34. Sustainable Living
35. Scientific Research
36. Playing Chess
37. Film Analysis
38. Astronomy
39. Interior Design
40. Robotics
41. Knitting/Crocheting
42. Pottery/Ceramics
43. Collecting (coins, stamps, vintage items)
44. Board Game Enthusiast
45. Public Speaking/Toastmasters
46. Music Production
47. Cycling
48. Motorsports
49. Film/TV Music Composition
50. Podcasting

Remember to only include interests and hobbies that are relevant to the position or showcase transferable skills that could benefit the job.

rewrite the following in the correct manner for a resume:

Content writing for social media, websites, and blogs focusing on many different subjects, including SEO articles.
Experience in content writing for social media, websites, and blogs, with a focus on a wide range of subjects, including SEO articles.

rewrite the following in the correct manner for a resume:

Several years of experience doing translations, transcriptions, and proofreading, focusing on many different subjects.
Extensive experience in translations, transcriptions, and proofreading across diverse subject matters, spanning multiple years.

rewrite the following in the correct manner for a resume:

Several years of experience in translations, transcriptions, and proofreading across diverse subject matters, including text, audio, and video.
Professional experience spanning multiple years in translations, transcriptions, and proofreading across diverse subject matters, encompassing text, audio, and video formats.

rewrite the following in the correct manner for a resume:

Several years of experience in translations, transcriptions, and proofreading across diverse subject matters, including text, audio, video, and image formats.

Designing and developing websites in various programming languages.

Extensive experience in translations, transcriptions, and proofreading across diverse subject matters, adept at handling various formats including text, audio, video, and image.

Proficient in designing and developing websites using multiple programming languages.

rewrite the following in the correct manner for a resume:

Several years of experience with graphic design using Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign).

Ranging from simple blogging and social media platforms to full-featured enterprise systems with search, workflow, collaboration, digital asset management, media management, and knowledge management features.

Extensive experience in graphic design utilizing Adobe Creative Suite, including Photoshop, Illustrator, and InDesign.

Proficient in creating designs for various platforms, from simple blogging and social media platforms to complex enterprise systems with advanced features such as search, workflow, collaboration, digital asset management, media management, and knowledge management.

rewrite the following with a better woring and readability for a resume:

Content management for various platforms, from simple blogging and social media platforms to full-featured enterprise systems with advanced features such as search, workflow, collaboration, digital asset management, media management, and knowledge management.

Proficient in managing content across a range of platforms, including simple blogging and social media platforms, as well as feature-rich enterprise systems with advanced capabilities like search, workflow, collaboration, digital asset management, media management, and knowledge management.

rewrite the following work experience items in the correct manner for a resume:

- Translation, transcription, proofreading, and linguistics (Portuguese to English, English to Portuguese)
- Content writing (English and Portuguese)
- Social media management and content creation (English and Portuguese)
- Graphic design
- Web design and development (English and Portuguese)
- Content management (English and Portuguese)

- Proficient in translation, transcription, proofreading, and linguistic services, with proficiency in Portuguese to English and English to Portuguese.
- Skilled in content writing for both English and Portuguese languages.
- Experienced in social media management and content creation for English and Portuguese platforms.
- Proficient in graphic design.
- Knowledgeable in web design and development for English and Portuguese websites.
- Competent in content management for English and Portuguese platforms.

ewrite the following in the correct manner for a resume:

Bachelor’s degrees in Graphic Design and Computer Science/Information Technology showcase my diverse skill set and blend creativity with analytical acumen.
Bachelor's degrees in Graphic Design and Computer Science/Information Technology demonstrate a diverse skill set encompassing both creative and analytical abilities.
